problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
mechanism: Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry
hypothesis: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Plasma. Plasma confinement via magnetic mirror geometry directly addresses this.
